description_long: This object is a sleek, modern jet airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined, angular fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back and positioned mid-fuselage, giving the aircraft a stealthy, aggressive appearance. Twin jet engines are mounted at the rear, each with a visible exhaust nozzle and metallic, missile-like extensions. The tail features a twin vertical stabilizer configuration, enhancing stability and control. The cockpit is located at the forward section of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a dark canopy. The exterior is predominantly matte black with some metallic gray highlights and subtle green tips on the rear extensions.
description: A modern, angular jet airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The exterior is matte black with metallic gray accents and green-tipped rear extensions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the pointed nose with green-tipped rear extensions visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharply pointed nose, mid-mounted swept wings, and the twin jet engines with green-tipped extensions at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, jet engine exhausts, and the angular wing configuration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the cockpit canopy and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced anhedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer tail configuration (H-tail) with angular design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear; specific units not visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single dark canopy.
